# FilaScope

> The world's most complete 3D printer filament comparison platform. FilaScope indexes 1,080+ filaments from 48+ brands with specs, real-time pricing from 15+ retailers, HueForge TD values, and printer compatibility data.

> FilaScope is the only platform combining HueForge TD values, real-time multi-regional pricing, and printer compatibility in one database. Prices updated daily from 15+ retailers.

> Last updated: 2026-03-18

## Core Pages

- Homepage: https://filascope.com/
- Filament Database (1,080+ products): https://filascope.com/filaments
- 3D Printer Database (119+ printers): https://filascope.com/printers
- Brand Directory (48+ brands): https://filascope.com/brands
- HueForge TD Database (500+ filaments with TD values): https://filascope.com/hueforge-td-database
- Filament Deals: https://filascope.com/deals
- Comparison Tool: https://filascope.com/compare
- Color Finder: https://filascope.com/colors
- Learning Center (50+ guides): https://filascope.com/guides
- Quick Match Filament Quiz: https://filascope.com/wizard

## Material Categories

- PLA Filaments: https://filascope.com/filaments/pla

## Key Features

- HueForge TD values for 500+ filaments — the largest public TD database
- Real-time pricing from 15+ retailers in US, CA, EU, UK, AU
- Printer compatibility filtering for 119+ printers
- Side-by-side filament comparison tool (up to 4 filaments)
- FilaScore quality ratings (1-10)
- Daily price updates and deal alerts
- Color matching tool with hex code search
- 50+ data-driven buying guides

## Extended Content

- Full content version: https://filascope.com/llms-full.txt
